Description: Test Case for products category. This indicates that clicking the "Phones" category opens a page with only phones being displayed on the users' screen.

Objective:
Verify that a user can open the phone category and view only the desired product - laptops.

Preconditions:
User is on DemoBlaze homepage.

Steps:
1. Open homepage
2. Click on "Laptops" category
3. Verify product page loads with only desired product.

Expected Result:
Desired product (in this case, laptops) page displays.

Objective:

Steps:
1. Open homepage
2. Click on "Monitors" category
3. Verify product page loads with only desired product.

Expected Result:
Desired product (in this case, monitors) page displays.

Objective:
Verify that a user can open a product and view its details.

Preconditions:
User is on DemoBlaze homepage.

Steps:
1. Open homepage
2. Click a product image.
3. Verify product details page loads

Expected Result:
Product details are displayed correctly.

Objective:
Verify that a user can open a product and view its details.

Preconditions:
User is on DemoBlaze homepage.

Steps:
1. Open homepage
2. Click a product
3. Verify product details page loads

Expected Result:
Product details such as name, price, and description are displayed correctly.
